meaning: vi.鼻子哼哼的做声,抽鼻涕n.抽鼻子
examples: "Please don't yell at me." She began to sniffle.
If I just sniffle, he's at my door with chicken soup.
Not every person with a sniffle need be tested-only a small, representative sample.
It won't cover every cough and sniffle, but it will be there in case the worst happens.
